name: exec-kit
description: Full project lifecycle management for 1–2 person PM-led teams. Covers project kickoff and initialisation (/kickoff + init agent), release setup (/release orchestrator), release planning, cycle planning, standup, retrospectives, status reports, risk management, and end-to-end lifecycle execution (/run orchestrator from Phase A through launch). Includes /test-run for end-to-end workflow walkthroughs and /presentation for Marp slide decks.
